name: ProgressLabel
description:
An accessible label for the progress bar.
Renders a `<span>` element.

className.description:
CSS class applied to the element, or a function that
returns a class based on the component’s state.

style.description:
Style applied to the element, or a function that
returns a style object based on the component’s state.
style.detailedType:
| React.CSSProperties
| ((
    state: Progress.Label.State,
  ) => CSSProperties | undefined)
| undefined

render.description:
Allows you to replace the component’s HTML element
with a different tag, or compose it with another component.

Accepts a `ReactElement` or a function that returns the element to render.
render.detailedType:
| ReactElement
| ((
    props: HTMLProps,
    state: Progress.Label.State,
  ) => ReactElement)

data-complete.description: Present when the progress has completed.

data-indeterminate.description: Present when the progress is in indeterminate state.

data-progressing.description: Present while the progress is progressing.
